calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kenneth Hollenbeck, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Large Screen Video Imaging, LLC.
John Rigney, Managing Partner for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Howard Mauskopf, Exotic Erotic Ball or Perry Mann, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Large Screen Video Imaging, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants Howard Mauskopg, Exotic Erotic Ball and Perry Mann, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,330.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12.825.00.
Attorney's Fees - $12,285.00.
Costs -$570.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $47,565.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Continued To Apr-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
